name: jotter-cloud
description: Self-hosted Cloudflare Worker for Jotter — drafts sync (R2) and read-only sharing (D1).

SYNC_TOKEN.description: Shared secret that protects your notes. Generate one in Jotter (Settings -> Sync -> Generate token) and paste the SAME value here. It is the only thing guarding sync and sharing - treat it like a password. Do not leave this blank.

AUTHOR_NAME.description: Optional. A display name shown on your shared-note pages (e.g. your name). Leave blank to omit.

AUTHOR_AVATAR.description: Optional. URL of a small avatar image shown on your shared-note pages. Leave blank to omit.
